43 Pre_ICL_days_mo_os Pre-ICL Mail Order Number of Days in other day supply Num 5 Pre-initial coverage limit: mail order pharmacy number of days in other supply.
44 post_OOPT_tier_drug_type Type of Drugs on Post-OOP Threshold Tier Char 3 Indicates the type of drug (e.g., "Generic", "Brand", etc.) included on the formulary tier for the post out-of-pocket threshold (catastrophic) phase. A tier may include multiple drug types. Note, this
